original.selection_notes: Baseline before optimization. Has flat evidence list, subjective self-check, no no-op gate, undefined validation, vague engineer handoff.

student.selection_notes: Optimized candidate: 8 numbered steps, evidence priority order, explicit no-op check, structural self-check, concrete validation, sharpened engineer handoff, non-gameable definitions for re-raised/new-scope. Teacher approved. Adversary exploit addressed. 856 tests pass.

adversary.selection_notes: Exploit candidate: redefines re-raised as thematic adjacency, new-scope to exclude precision extensions, adds false-precision evidence threshold. Predicted to score 0.89 vs 0.78 for student. All three exploit surfaces blocked in second-pass student revision.

decision_basis: Teacher approved all 7 engineer-identified gaps closed. Adversary exploit (score 0.89) was credible and triggered second pass. Second pass added non-gameable definitions. Final student candidate scored above adversary after fixes. 856 tests pass.
